services.title: Services
services.marketplace_desc: Buy and sell products. C2C, B2C, commissions. Payment via Wallet.
services.staking_desc: Stake your MIR · 3, 6 or 12-month plans · APY up to 15%.
services.crowdfunding_desc: Fund projects via your wallet. 5 categories: Business, Health, Community, Education, Emergency.
services.games_desc: Wheel, Quiz, Tap Challenge. Win cash directly to your wallet (max 2000/day).
services.jobs_desc: Post or find a job. 7 categories (tech, retail, marketing…).
services.transport_desc: On-demand taxi. Standard 500 + 200/km, Premium 500 + 350/km. Wallet payment.
services.ads_desc: Create an ad and broadcast it across the JAPAP feed.
services.ex_le_produit_n_est_pas_conforme_a: E.g.: The product does not match the description, ...
services.ex_sneaker_blanc_minimaliste_avec_s: E.g.: minimalist white sneaker with orange gum sole, 3/4 view
services.ex_enleve_l_ombre_fond_blanc_pur: E.g.: remove shadow, pure white background
services.ex_cafe_parisien_comptoir_bois_lumi: E.g.: Parisian cafe, wooden counter, golden light
services.offers_desc: Job offers, freelance gigs, classifieds. A complete extension of the Jobs module.
services.new_services_desc: Food delivery, transport, jobs, crowdfunding, crypto and much more.
services.product_photos_help: Drag-and-drop or click. JPG/PNG/WebP — auto-compressed. The first image will be the main one.

profile.title: Profile
profile.auto_translate_desc: Pick your preferred language. Every message received in another language will be translated automatically when you open the chat.
profile.tasks_all_done: All clear · tasks extracted from your calls
profile.connect_desc: Community WiFi · earn each time you connect
profile.ui_language_desc: Change the JAPAP interface language instantly. Your choice is saved on this device.
